basic_details.job_title: NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NIT Tiruchirappalli is recruiting 01 JRF / PA-I for a renewable-integrated smart EV charging platform project. B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech holders in relevant engineering disciplines can apply.

important_dates.interview_date: Second week of August 2026 (to be intimated)

age_limit.details: JRF: Maximum 35 years (relaxation as per GOI norms) PA-I: Maximum 50 years

qualification.details: criteria: Details | job description: Power converter design, simulation, hardware fabrication, control implementation, experiments, testing, and report writing
qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech in Electrical and Electronics Engineering or M.E/M.Tech in Power Electronics/Power Systems/Control Systems or relevant with valid GATE score

selection_process: Selection will be based on scrutiny of applications followed by Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be informed by email. Selected candidates may register for M.S. (By Research)/Ph.D. as per NIT rules.
how_to_apply: Candidates should send the duly filled application (prescribed format) along with relevant supporting documents as a single PDF file by email to [email protected]. Subject Line: “Application for JRF/Project Associate-I Position – ANRF” Last Date: 27 July 2026 (5:00 PM)
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Preference will be given to candidates with good academic record and relevant experience. Selected candidates are expected to join immediately.

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy JRF / Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: NIT Tiruchirappalli invites applications for the position of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Project Associate-I (PA-I) under the ANRF project in the Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering. The appointment is temporary, initially for one year, and extendable up to three years based on performance.

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy JRF / Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: NIT Tiruchirappalli is recruiting 01 JRF / PA-I for a renewable-integrated smart EV charging platform project. B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech holders in relevant engineering disciplines can apply.

rows.national_institute_of_technology_nit_tir: Renewable-Integrated Smart EV Charging Platform Featuring Reconfigurability, Interoperability, and grid interactive Management (RISE)
JRF (GATE qualified): ₹37,000/- (1st & 2nd year), ₹42,000/- (3rd year) PA-I (Non-GATE): ₹30,000/- (1st & 2nd year), ₹33,000/- (3rd year)

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy JRF / Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

rows.date: Second week of August 2026 (to be intimated)

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy JRF / Project Associate Vacancy Details 2026
NIT Trichy JRF / Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: B.E/B.Tech in Electrical and Electronics Engineering or M.E/M.Tech in Power Electronics/Power Systems/Control Systems or relevant with valid GATE score
B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech in relevant specialization (M.E/M.Tech in Power Electronics desirable)
Power converter design, simulation, hardware fabrication, control implementation, experiments, testing, and report writing

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy JRF / Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: JRF: Maximum 35 years (relaxation as per GOI norms) PA-I: Maximum 50 years

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy JRF / Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on scrutiny of applications followed by Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be informed by email. Selected candidates may register for M.S. (By Research)/Ph.D. as per NIT rules.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NIT Trichy JRF / Project Associate Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates should send the duly filled application (prescribed format) along with relevant supporting documents as a single PDF file by email to [email protected] . Subject Line: “Application for JRF/Project Associate-I Position – ANRF” Last Date: 27 July 2026 (5:00 PM)

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for NIT Trichy JRF / Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Preference will be given to candidates with good academic record and relevant experience. Selected candidates are expected to join immediately.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Tiruchirappalli JRF / PA-I 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for email submission is 27 July 2026 (5:00 PM).

faq.question: Q2. How many JRF / Project Associate vacancies are available at NIT Tiruchirappalli?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for JRF / PA-I.

faq.question: Q3. What is the fellowship amount for JRF at NIT Tiruchirappalli?
faq.answer: ₹37,000/- (1st & 2nd year) and ₹42,000/- (3rd year) for GATE qualified candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for JRF position at NIT Tiruchirappalli?
faq.answer: B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech in Electrical/Electronics/Power Electronics with valid GATE score.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for JRF at NIT Tiruchirappalli?
faq.answer: Maximum 35 years (relaxation as per GOI norms).

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for NIT Tiruchirappalli ANRF Project JRF?
faq.answer: Send the filled application and documents as single PDF to [email protected] with proper subject line.

faq.question: Q7. When will the interview be conducted for NIT Tiruchirappalli JRF?
faq.answer: The interview will be held in the second week of August 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What are the key responsibilities for the JRF / PA-I position?
faq.answer: Power converter design, simulation, hardware fabrication, control implementation, and testing.

faq.question: Q9. Is the JRF / PA-I position at NIT Tiruchirappalli permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely temporary and initially for one year, extendable up to three years.

faq.question: Q10. Can selected candidates register for Ph.D. at NIT Tiruchirappalli?
faq.answer: Yes, selected candidates may register for M.S. (By Research) or Ph.D. as per institute rules.
